info.title: Infrascript CLI
info.description: For more information on how to use this tool, visit: https://www.infrascript.com/resources/docs

commands.name: Backend-State
commands.description:
The storage for each blueprints state can be configured from the Infrascript web application.
Depending on the provider selected, additional environment variabled may be required for execution.
See https://www.infrascript.com/resources/docs for more details.

commands.name: destroy
commands.description: Destroy all existing resources in the blueprint

commands.name: Environment
commands.description:
The environment to execute the blueprint for can be specified using flag:
--env, --environment [environment-identifier]
If no environment is specified, the default configurations for the blueprint are used

commands.name: preview
commands.description: Preview resources in the blueprint that would be created or updated

commands.name: update
commands.description: Create or update resources in the blueprint
